mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_TEL, MEMBER_ROLE, LOGIN_TYPE, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_DEL_FL FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_TEL, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_DEL_FL, MEMBER_ROLE, LOGIN_TYPE ) VALUES ( SEQ_MEMBER_NO.NEXTVAL, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPw}, #{memberTel}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, NVL(#{memberRole}, 'MEMBER'), NVL(#{loginType}, 'NORMAL') )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_TEL = #{tel} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
SELECT MEMBER_PW FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNVEILING WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND UNVEILING_STATUS = 'UPCOMING') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TOTAL_ORDER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND ORDER_STATUS = 'READY') AS active_count FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'Y', WITHDRAWAL_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_TEL, MEMBER_ROLE, LOGIN_TYPE, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_DEL_FL, WITHDRAWAL_DATE FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{email} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MEMBER_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO MEMBER ( MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_TEL, MEMBER_ROLE, LOGIN_TYPE, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_DEL_FL ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPw}, #{memberTel}, NVL(#{memberRole}, 'MEMBER'), NVL(#{loginType}, 'NORMAL'), SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_EMAIL FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_TEL, MEMBER_ROLE, LOGIN_TYPE FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
